issues.description: Missing condition for cost requirement: 'place 2 {Thriller Bark Pirates} type cards from trash at bottom of deck'. DSL must include condition checking trash and cost action (SearchDeck or equivalent to move cards from trash to deck bottom).
Target scope incomplete: must exclude [Perona] character. Current target allows any character; needs exclusion filter.
Missing cost action: ability requires placing 2 Thriller Bark Pirates cards from trash to deck bottom as activation cost, not just power boost effect.
